name: Push Ups
description: Keep back straight, lower until chest nearly touches floor.

name: Tricep Dips
description: Hands behind on chair, lower body, then push up.

name: Bicep Curls
description: Curl dumbbells slowly, elbows at sides.

name: Crunches
description: Lie on back, lift shoulders toward knees.

name: Plank
description: Hold your body straight like a board.

name: Leg Raises
description: Lie on back, lift legs straight up and down.

name: Squats
description: Feet shoulder width, lower hips to parallel.

name: Lunges
description: Step forward, bend both knees, push back.

name: Glute Bridges
description: Lie on back, lift hips upward.

name: Mountain Climbers
description: In plank, drive knees alternately to chest.

name: Burpees
description: Squat, jump back to plank, push up, jump up.

name: Superman
description: Lie face down, lift arms and legs simultaneously.

name: Bicycle Crunches
description: Alternate elbow to opposite knee while lying down.

name: Side Plank
description: Hold your body on one side, elbow under shoulder.
